meta.title: Services - Amphibian Labs
meta.description: AI backends, system integration, workflow automation, and honest consultancy for small and mid-sized businesses. No vendor lock-in.

hero.title: What can we build together?
hero.subtitle: We enhance what you already have with AI, automation, and integration. Every engagement starts with listening and ends with you owning everything.

understand.title: Understand
understand.subtitle: Consultancy and business analysis
understand.description: Before we build anything, we listen. Discovery sessions, stakeholder workshops, and honest recommendations - even if that means suggesting a competitor.

build.title: Build
build.subtitle: Engineering and delivery
build.description: AI-powered backends, system integrations, and workflow automations - built iteratively, delivered with documentation, and fully owned by you.

share.title: Share
share.subtitle: Open source and community
share.description: Production-grade tools under MIT license. Templates, blueprints, and reference architectures that any business can use.

automation.title: Workflow automation
automation.excerpt: Eliminate manual steps across platforms with Power Automate, Make, and n8n.

integration.title: System integration
integration.excerpt: Connect Microsoft 365, SharePoint, CRMs, and third-party APIs without migrating anything.

ai-extraction.title: AI-powered data extraction
ai-extraction.excerpt: Document intelligence, unstructured data extraction, and NLP pipelines for real-world documents.

web-solutions.title: Web solutions and portals
web-solutions.excerpt: Client-facing portals, dashboards, and web applications that connect to your existing backend systems.

vendor-selection.title: Vendor selection and advisory
vendor-selection.excerpt: Unbiased technology recommendations. We'll tell you when an off-the-shelf product beats a custom build.

crm-cleanup.title: CRM cleanup and optimisation
crm-cleanup.excerpt: Audit, deduplicate, restructure, and automate your CRM so it actually works for your team.

items.question: Do I need to replace my existing systems?
items.answer: No. Our entire approach is built around enhancing what you already have. We add intelligent layers on top of your current tools - no migrations, no disruption.

items.question: What industries do you work with?
items.answer: We work across healthcare, construction, professional services, trades, and retail. Our tools are industry-agnostic - what matters is the workflow, not the sector.

items.question: How long does a typical project take?
items.answer: Discovery sessions take 2 hours. A scoped automation or integration project typically runs 2 to 6 weeks. Larger AI backend projects run 6 to 12 weeks with iterative delivery throughout.

items.question: Will I own the code you build?
items.answer: Yes. Everything we build is yours. Full source code, documentation, and BAU handover. No vendor lock-in, no recurring license fees for code we wrote.

items.question: What if I just need advice, not a build?
items.answer: That's exactly what our Discovery tier is for. We run stakeholder workshops, map your current state, and deliver a written report with recommendations - which may or may not include us.

items.question: Do you offer ongoing support after a project?
items.answer: Yes. Our Evolve tier provides a monthly retainer for ongoing integrations, expanding automation coverage, and keeping your systems aligned as your business grows.

cta.title: Not sure which service fits?
cta.body: Book a discovery session. We'll listen to what's broken and recommend the right path - even if it's not us.
